title: rosa canina var. pubescens
intro: Rosa canina var. pubescens, also known as the hairy dog rose, is a variety of the dog rose plant (Rosa canina), which is a deciduous shrub native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of vitamin C, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. pubescens include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it useful for treating conditions such as scurvy, wounds, and digestive issues. Rosa canina var. pubescens can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, tinctures, and salves, and is often used to create natural skincare products and supplements.
